creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Sonntag, 10. September 2006 23:47 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of irc/gseen.mod,
>
> Please note that PR ports/103105 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103105

This is ok, I think.
Please commit this patch.

Thanks,

Gerrit
